## DOMPolicy.protect() method

Protects a DOM sink that intends to write to the DOM.

**Signature:**

```typescript
protect(tagName: string | null, aspect: DOMAspect, aspectName: string, sink: DOMSink): DOMSink;
```

</td><td>

<tr><td>

</td><td>
